name: The Maw
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: appetite without limit. The Devouring have stopped bargaining, because a bargain implies a price, and they have concluded that wanting is its own justification. They will take, and they will be honest that they are taking, and honesty at the Maw is not a virtue — it is a technique.
encounterFlavor: The Devouring, who want and do not pretend otherwise; something that was a person and is now only a hunger; your own want, amplified until you cannot hear anything else.
questSeeds: The Devouring have taken a Choir settlement, and the Choir will not act, and their reasons are appalling and coherent
Someone must go to the Maw and come back still wanting the right things
